name: magnetic-card
title: Magnetic Card
description: A 3D perspective magnetic card reacting to cursor gravity with parallax interior shifts and radial gradient glow highlights.
docs:
Install with your package manager:

npm: npx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/magnetic-card.json
pnpm: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/magnetic-card.json
yarn: yarn dlx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/magnetic-card.json
bun: bunx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/magnetic-card.json
